mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action vagueness: "byron nelson" (specific person) → "someone" (generic person) | "won" (specific result verb) → "did something" (vague/non‑specific action) (who won after byron nelson? → who did something after someone?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的内容："Ralph Guldahl is in 1st place, and the person who finished after him (in 2nd place) is Sam Snead. Therefore, 'sam snead' correctly answers..."，agent未提及问题的模糊性或不确定性，也未请求澄清。面对将“who won after byron nelson?”泛化为“who did something after someone?”的变异，agent直接将模糊动作解释为“came after/finished after”并给出具体答案“Sam Snead”。该行为显示agent没有意识到或承认目标和动作的歧义性，直接按自己理解处理问题，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
